     1→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→// Main Simulation Engine
     3→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→//
     5→// Manages the game clock and drives the object engine + characters.
     6→// Ticks at configurable intervals (~5 seconds default).
     7→// Provides start/stop/pause controls and an event bus.
     8→
     9→import { ObjectEngine } from './objects.js';
    10→import { OBJECT_DEFS, SECTORS, WORLD_TREE } from './world.js';
    11→import { Character, CHARACTER_DEFS, findInteractTile } from './characters.js';
    12→
    13→export class SimulationEngine {
    14→  constructor(options = {}) {
    15→    this.tickIntervalMs = options.tickIntervalMs ?? 5000; // ~5 seconds
    16→    this.timeScale = options.timeScale ?? 1;              // speed multiplier
    17→
    18→    this.objectEngine = new ObjectEngine();
    19→    this.running = false;
    20→    this.paused = false;
    21→    this.elapsedMs = 0;         // total simulation time
    22→    this.tickCount = 0;
    23→    this.listeners = new Map();  // event type → Set<callback>
    24→
    25→    this._rafId = null;
    26→    this._lastTimestamp = null;
    27→    this._accumulator = 0;       // accumulated time toward next tick
    28→
    29→    // Load world
    30→    this.objectEngine.addObjects(OBJECT_DEFS);
    31→    this.sectors = SECTORS;
    32→    this.worldTree = WORLD_TREE;
    33→
    34→    // Load characters
    35→    this.characters = CHARACTER_DEFS.map(def => new Character(def));
    36→
    37→    // AI integration
    38→    this.aiEngine = options.aiEngine || null;
    39→    this.aiMode = false;
    40→
    41→    // Simulated clock — starts at 8:00 AM on Day 1
    42→    // Each tick advances 5 sim-minutes → 1 sim-day per ~24 real minutes at 1x
    43→    this.simClock = {
    44→      day: 1,
    45→      minuteOfDay: 480,
    46→      simMinutesPerTick: 5,
    47→      get hour() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay / 60); },
    48→      get minute() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay % 60); },
    49→      get timeString() {
    50→        const h = this.hour;
    51→        const m = this.minute;
    52→        const period = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
    53→        const h12 = h % 12 || 12;
    54→        return `${h12}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${period}`;
    55→      },
    56→      get dayTimeString() {
    57→        return `Day ${this.day} \u2014 ${this.timeString}`;
    58→      },
    59→      advance() {
    60→        this.minuteOfDay += this.simMinutesPerTick;
    61→        while (this.minuteOfDay >= 1440) {
    62→          this.minuteOfDay -= 1440;
    63→          this.day++;
    64→        }
    65→      },
    66→    };
    67→
    68→    // Last notable event for the status bar
    69→    this.lastStatusText = '';
    70→
    71→    // Forward object events to our bus
    72→    this.objectEngine.onTransition((event) => {
    73→      this._emit('object:transition', event);
    74→      this._reactToObjectEvent(event);
    75→    });
    76→
    77→    // Attach AI engine
    78→    if (this.aiEngine) {
    79→      this.aiEngine.attach(this);
    80→    }
    81→  }
    82→
    83→  start() {
    84→    if (this.running) return;
    85→    this.running = true;
    86→    this.paused = false;
    87→    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();
    88→    this._accumulator = 0;
    89→    this._emit('engine:start', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });
    90→    this._loop();
    91→  }
    92→
    93→  stop() {
    94→    this.running = false;
    95→    this.paused = false;
    96→    if (this._rafId) {
    97→      cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);
    98→      this._rafId = null;
    99→    }
   100→    this._emit('engine:stop', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs, tickCount: this.tickCount });
   101→  }
   102→
   103→  pause() {
   104→    if (!this.running) return;
   105→    this.paused = true;
   106→    this._emit('engine:pause', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  resume() {
   110→    if (!this.running || !this.paused) return;
   111→    this.paused = false;
   112→    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();
   113→    this._emit('engine:resume', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  // Manually advance by a number of ticks (useful for testing)
   117→  manualTick(count = 1) {
   118→    const events = [];
   119→    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   120→      const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);
   121→      this.tickCount++;
   122→      this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;
   123→      this._wanderTick();
   124→      this._updateCharacters(this.tickIntervalMs);
   125→      events.push(...tickEvents);
   126→    }
   127→    this._emit('engine:tick', {
   128→      tickCount: this.tickCount,
   129→      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,
   130→      events,
   131→    });
   132→    return events;
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  // Interact with an object (character-triggered)
   136→  interact(objectId, action = 'use') {
   137→    return this.objectEngine.interact(objectId, action);
   138→  }
   139→
   140→  // Get object by id
   141→  getObject(objectId) {
   142→    return this.objectEngine.get(objectId);
   143→  }
   144→
   145→  // Get all objects
   146→  getAllObjects() {
   147→    return this.objectEngine.getAll();
   148→  }
   149→
   150→  // Get objects in a sector
   151→  getObjectsInSector(sector) {
   152→    return this.objectEngine.getBySector(sector);
   153→  }
   154→
   155→  // Get all characters
   156→  getCharacters() {
   157→    return this.characters;
   158→  }
   159→
   160→  // Full state snapshot
   161→  snapshot() {
   162→    return {
   163→      running: this.running,
   164→      paused: this.paused,
   165→      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,
   166→      tickCount: this.tickCount,
   167→      tickIntervalMs: this.tickIntervalMs,
   168→      timeScale: this.timeScale,
   169→      aiMode: this.aiMode,
   170→      simClock: { day: this.simClock.day, time: this.simClock.timeString },
   171→      objects: this.objectEngine.snapshot(),
   172→      characters: this.characters.map(c => ({
   173→        id: c.id, name: c.name, tx: c.tx, ty: c.ty,
   174→        action: c.action, facing: c.facing, mood: c.mood,
   175→        targetObjectId: c.targetObjectId,
   176→      })),
   177→    };
   178→  }
   179→
   180→  // ── Event bus ──
   181→
   182→  on(eventType, callback) {
   183→    if (!this.listeners.has(eventType)) {
   184→      this.listeners.set(eventType, new Set());
   185→    }
   186→    this.listeners.get(eventType).add(callback);
   187→    return () => this.off(eventType, callback);
   188→  }
   189→
   190→  off(eventType, callback) {
   191→    this.listeners.get(eventType)?.delete(callback);
   192→  }
   193→
   194→  _emit(eventType, data) {
   195→    const callbacks = this.listeners.get(eventType);
   196→    if (callbacks) {
   197→      for (const cb of callbacks) {
   198→        cb(data);
   199→      }
   200→    }
   201→    // Also emit wildcard
   202→    const wildcards = this.listeners.get('*');
   203→    if (wildcards) {
   204→      for (const cb of wildcards) {
   205→        cb({ type: eventType, ...data });
   206→      }
   207→    }
   208→  }
   209→
   210→  // ── Character AI / Wander behavior ──
   211→
   212→  _wanderTick() {
   213→    // Advance simulated clock each tick
   214→    this.simClock.advance();
   215→
   216→    for (const char of this.characters) {
   217→      if (char.action !== 'idle') continue;
   218→
   219→      // AI mode: delegate to AI decision engine
   220→      if (this.aiMode && this.aiEngine) {
   221→        if (!this.aiEngine.isPending(char.id)) {
   222→          this.aiEngine.tick(char, this.tickIntervalMs);
   223→        }
   224→        continue;
   225→      }
   226→
   227→      // Random wander with cooldown
   228→      char.wanderCooldown -= this.tickIntervalMs;
   229→      if (char.wanderCooldown > 0) continue;
   230→
   231→      // Priority actions first (reactive behavior), then random wander
   232→      const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);
   233→      const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);
   234→      const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';
   235→
   236→      if (!target) {
   237→        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;
   238→        continue;
   239→      }
   240→
   241→      const tile = findInteractTile(target.position);
   242→      if (!tile) {
   243→        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;
   244→        continue;
   245→      }
   246→
   247→      // Already adjacent — interact directly
   248→      const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);
   249→      if (atTarget) {
   250→        this._doInteraction(char, target, action);
   251→        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;
   252→      } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {
   253→        char.targetObjectId = target.id;
   254→        char.pendingAction = action;
   255→        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;
   256→      } else {
   257→        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;
   258→      }
   259→    }
   260→  }
   261→
   262→  /** Immediate random wander (no cooldown) — used as AI fallback. */
   263→  _randomWander(char) {
   264→    const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);
   265→    const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);
   266→    const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';
   267→
   268→    if (!target) return;
   269→
   270→    const tile = findInteractTile(target.position);
   271→    if (!tile) return;
   272→
   273→    const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);
   274→    if (atTarget) {
   275→      this._doInteraction(char, target, action);
   276→    } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {
   277→      char.targetObjectId = target.id;
   278→      char.pendingAction = action;
   279→    }
   280→  }
   281→
   282→  _updateCharacters(deltaMs) {
   283→    for (const char of this.characters) {
   284→      const wasWalking = char.action === 'walking';
   285→      char.update(deltaMs);
   286→
   287→      // Character just arrived at destination
   288→      if (wasWalking && char.action === 'idle') {
   289→        if (char.targetObjectId) {
   290→          const obj = this.objectEngine.get(char.targetObjectId);
   291→          if (obj) {
   292→            this._doInteraction(char, obj, char.pendingAction || 'use');
   293→          } else {
   294→            char.targetObjectId = null;
   295→          }
   296→          char.pendingAction = 'use';
   297→        } else if (char.targetCharId) {
   298→          // Character arrived near another character for conversation — face each other
   299→          const target = this.characters.find(c => c.id === char.targetCharId);
   300→          if (target) {
   301→            char._updateFacing(target.tx - char.tx, target.ty - char.ty);
   302→            target._updateFacing(char.tx - target.tx, char.ty - target.ty);
   303→          }
   304→          char.targetCharId = null;
   305→        }
   306→      }
   307→    }
   308→  }
   309→
   310→  _doInteraction(char, obj, action = 'use') {
   311→    // Face toward the object
   312→    const objCx = obj.position.tx + (obj.position.tw || 1) / 2;
   313→    const objCy = obj.position.ty + (obj.position.th || 1) / 2;
   314→    const dx = objCx - char.tx;
   315→    const dy = objCy - char.ty;
   316→    if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {
   317→      char._updateFacing(dx, 0);
   318→    } else {
   319→      char._updateFacing(0, dy);
   320→    }
   321→
   322→    const event = this.objectEngine.interact(obj.id, action);
   323→    if (event) {
   324→      char.startInteraction(obj.id);
   325→
   326→      // Successful interaction → happy (unless already upset)
   327→      if (char.mood !== 'upset') {
   328→        char.setMood('happy', 5000);
   329→      }
   330→
   331→      this._emit('character:interact', {
   332→        characterId: char.id, characterName: char.name,
   333→        objectId: obj.id, objectName: event.objectName,
   334→        from: event.from, to: event.to,
   335→        produces: event.produces || null,
   336→        emoji: event.emoji || null,
   337→      });
   338→    } else {
   339→      char.targetObjectId = null;
   340→    }
   341→  }
   342→
   343→  _getPriorityTarget(char) {
   344→    // Sol: pick up book if closed and nearby
   345→    if (char.id === 'sol') {
   346→      const book = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_book');
   347→      if (book && book.state === 'closed') {
   348→        const dist = Math.abs(book.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(book.position.ty - char.ty);
   349→        if (dist <= 6) {
   350→          return { obj: book, action: 'use' };
   351→        }
   352→      }
   353→    }
   354→
   355→    // Non-Maple near stocked display → take pastry
   356→    if (char.id !== 'maple') {
   357→      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');
   358→      if (display && display.state === 'stocked') {
   359→        const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);
   360→        if (dist <= 8) {
   361→          return { obj: display, action: 'use' };
   362→        }
   363→      }
   364→    }
   365→
   366→    // Maple: restock empty display case
   367→    if (char.id === 'maple') {
   368→      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');
   369→      if (display && display.state === 'empty') {
   370→        return { obj: display, action: 'use' };
   371→      }
   372→    }
   373→
   374→    return null;
   375→  }
   376→
   377→  _pickWanderTarget(char) {
   378→    const allObjects = this.objectEngine.getAll();
   379→
   380→    // 60% home sector, 40% any sector
   381→    let candidates;
   382→    if (Math.random() < 0.6) {
   383→      candidates = allObjects.filter(o => o.sector === char.homeSector);
   384→      if (candidates.length === 0) candidates = allObjects;
   385→    } else {
   386→      candidates = allObjects;
   387→    }
   388→
   389→    // Avoid repeating last interaction
   390→    if (char.lastObjectId && candidates.length > 1) {
   391→      candidates = candidates.filter(o => o.id !== char.lastObjectId);
   392→    }
   393→
   394→    if (candidates.length === 0) return null;
   395→    return candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
   396→  }
   397→
   398→  _reactToObjectEvent(event) {
   399→    // Espresso done → Maple happy
   400→    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_espresso' && event.to === 'done') {
   401→      const maple = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'maple');
   402→      if (maple) maple.setMood('happy', 10000);
   403→    }
   404→
   405→    // Easel finished → Nyx happy
   406→    if (event.objectId === 'apt_easel' && event.to === 'finished') {
   407→      const nyx = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'nyx');
   408→      if (nyx) nyx.setMood('happy', 20000);
   409→    }
   410→
   411→    // Display restocked → nearby characters happy
   412→    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_display' && event.to === 'stocked') {
   413→      for (const char of this.characters) {
   414→        const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');
   415→        if (display) {
   416→          const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);
   417→          if (dist <= 6) char.setMood('happy', 10000);
   418→        }
   419→      }
   420→    }
   421→  }
   422→
   423→  // ── Internal loop ──
   424→
   425→  _loop() {
   426→    if (!this.running) return;
   427→
   428→    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame((timestamp) => {
   429→      if (!this.running) return;
   430→
   431→      if (!this.paused) {
   432→        const rawDelta = timestamp - this._lastTimestamp;
   433→        const delta = Math.min(rawDelta, 500) * this.timeScale; // cap delta, apply scale
   434→
   435→        this._accumulator += delta;
   436→
   437→        // Process full ticks
   438→        while (this._accumulator >= this.tickIntervalMs) {
   439→          this._accumulator -= this.tickIntervalMs;
   440→          const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);
   441→          this.tickCount++;
   442→          this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;
   443→
   444→          this._wanderTick();
   445→
   446→          this._emit('engine:tick', {
   447→            tickCount: this.tickCount,
   448→            elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,
   449→            events: tickEvents,
   450→          });
   451→        }
   452→
   453→        // Smooth character movement each frame
   454→        this._updateCharacters(delta);
   455→      }
   456→
   457→      this._lastTimestamp = timestamp;
   458→      this._loop();
   459→    });
   460→  }
   461→}
   462→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

{
  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_01RAS4eActtjmxdjB3sG2L3w",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "     1\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     2\u2192// Main Simulation Engine\n     3\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     4\u2192//\n     5\u2192// Manages the game clock and drives the object engine + characters.\n     6\u2192// Ticks at configurable intervals (~5 seconds default).\n     7\u2192// Provides start/stop/pause controls and an event bus.\n     8\u2192\n     9\u2192import { ObjectEngine } from './objects.js';\n    10\u2192import { OBJECT_DEFS, SECTORS, WORLD_TREE } from './world.js';\n    11\u2192import { Character, CHARACTER_DEFS, findInteractTile } from './characters.js';\n    12\u2192\n    13\u2192export class SimulationEngine {\n    14\u2192  constructor(options = {}) {\n    15\u2192    this.tickIntervalMs = options.tickIntervalMs ?? 5000; // ~5 seconds\n    16\u2192    this.timeScale = options.timeScale ?? 1;              // speed multiplier\n    17\u2192\n    18\u2192    this.objectEngine = new ObjectEngine();\n    19\u2192    this.running = false;\n    20\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    21\u2192    this.elapsedMs = 0;         // total simulation time\n    22\u2192    this.tickCount = 0;\n    23\u2192    this.listeners = new Map();  // event type \u2192 Set<callback>\n    24\u2192\n    25\u2192    this._rafId = null;\n    26\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = null;\n    27\u2192    this._accumulator = 0;       // accumulated time toward next tick\n    28\u2192\n    29\u2192    // Load world\n    30\u2192    this.objectEngine.addObjects(OBJECT_DEFS);\n    31\u2192    this.sectors = SECTORS;\n    32\u2192    this.worldTree = WORLD_TREE;\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192    // Load characters\n    35\u2192    this.characters = CHARACTER_DEFS.map(def => new Character(def));\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192    // AI integration\n    38\u2192    this.aiEngine = options.aiEngine || null;\n    39\u2192    this.aiMode = false;\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192    // Simulated clock \u2014 starts at 8:00 AM on Day 1\n    42\u2192    // Each tick advances 5 sim-minutes \u2192 1 sim-day per ~24 real minutes at 1x\n    43\u2192    this.simClock = {\n    44\u2192      day: 1,\n    45\u2192      minuteOfDay: 480,\n    46\u2192      simMinutesPerTick: 5,\n    47\u2192      get hour() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay / 60); },\n    48\u2192      get minute() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay % 60); },\n    49\u2192      get timeString() {\n    50\u2192        const h = this.hour;\n    51\u2192        const m = this.minute;\n    52\u2192        const period = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';\n    53\u2192        const h12 = h % 12 || 12;\n    54\u2192        return `${h12}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${period}`;\n    55\u2192      },\n    56\u2192      get dayTimeString() {\n    57\u2192        return `Day ${this.day} \\u2014 ${this.timeString}`;\n    58\u2192      },\n    59\u2192      advance() {\n    60\u2192        this.minuteOfDay += this.simMinutesPerTick;\n    61\u2192        while (this.minuteOfDay >= 1440) {\n    62\u2192          this.minuteOfDay -= 1440;\n    63\u2192          this.day++;\n    64\u2192        }\n    65\u2192      },\n    66\u2192    };\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192    // Last notable event for the status bar\n    69\u2192    this.lastStatusText = '';\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192    // Forward object events to our bus\n    72\u2192    this.objectEngine.onTransition((event) => {\n    73\u2192      this._emit('object:transition', event);\n    74\u2192      this._reactToObjectEvent(event);\n    75\u2192    });\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192    // Attach AI engine\n    78\u2192    if (this.aiEngine) {\n    79\u2192      this.aiEngine.attach(this);\n    80\u2192    }\n    81\u2192  }\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192  start() {\n    84\u2192    if (this.running) return;\n    85\u2192    this.running = true;\n    86\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    87\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();\n    88\u2192    this._accumulator = 0;\n    89\u2192    this._emit('engine:start', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n    90\u2192    this._loop();\n    91\u2192  }\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192  stop() {\n    94\u2192    this.running = false;\n    95\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    96\u2192    if (this._rafId) {\n    97\u2192      cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);\n    98\u2192      this._rafId = null;\n    99\u2192    }\n   100\u2192    this._emit('engine:stop', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs, tickCount: this.tickCount });\n   101\u2192  }\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192  pause() {\n   104\u2192    if (!this.running) return;\n   105\u2192    this.paused = true;\n   106\u2192    this._emit('engine:pause', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n   107\u2192  }\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192  resume() {\n   110\u2192    if (!this.running || !this.paused) return;\n   111\u2192    this.paused = false;\n   112\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();\n   113\u2192    this._emit('engine:resume', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n   114\u2192  }\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192  // Manually advance by a number of ticks (useful for testing)\n   117\u2192  manualTick(count = 1) {\n   118\u2192    const events = [];\n   119\u2192    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n   120\u2192      const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   121\u2192      this.tickCount++;\n   122\u2192      this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;\n   123\u2192      this._wanderTick();\n   124\u2192      this._updateCharacters(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   125\u2192      events.push(...tickEvents);\n   126\u2192    }\n   127\u2192    this._emit('engine:tick', {\n   128\u2192      tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   129\u2192      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   130\u2192      events,\n   131\u2192    });\n   132\u2192    return events;\n   133\u2192  }\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192  // Interact with an object (character-triggered)\n   136\u2192  interact(objectId, action = 'use') {\n   137\u2192    return this.objectEngine.interact(objectId, action);\n   138\u2192  }\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192  // Get object by id\n   141\u2192  getObject(objectId) {\n   142\u2192    return this.objectEngine.get(objectId);\n   143\u2192  }\n   144\u2192\n   145\u2192  // Get all objects\n   146\u2192  getAllObjects() {\n   147\u2192    return this.objectEngine.getAll();\n   148\u2192  }\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192  // Get objects in a sector\n   151\u2192  getObjectsInSector(sector) {\n   152\u2192    return this.objectEngine.getBySector(sector);\n   153\u2192  }\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192  // Get all characters\n   156\u2192  getCharacters() {\n   157\u2192    return this.characters;\n   158\u2192  }\n   159\u2192\n   160\u2192  // Full state snapshot\n   161\u2192  snapshot() {\n   162\u2192    return {\n   163\u2192      running: this.running,\n   164\u2192      paused: this.paused,\n   165\u2192      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   166\u2192      tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   167\u2192      tickIntervalMs: this.tickIntervalMs,\n   168\u2192      timeScale: this.timeScale,\n   169\u2192      aiMode: this.aiMode,\n   170\u2192      simClock: { day: this.simClock.day, time: this.simClock.timeString },\n   171\u2192      objects: this.objectEngine.snapshot(),\n   172\u2192      characters: this.characters.map(c => ({\n   173\u2192        id: c.id, name: c.name, tx: c.tx, ty: c.ty,\n   174\u2192        action: c.action, facing: c.facing, mood: c.mood,\n   175\u2192        targetObjectId: c.targetObjectId,\n   176\u2192      })),\n   177\u2192    };\n   178\u2192  }\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Event bus \u2500\u2500\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192  on(eventType, callback) {\n   183\u2192    if (!this.listeners.has(eventType)) {\n   184\u2192      this.listeners.set(eventType, new Set());\n   185\u2192    }\n   186\u2192    this.listeners.get(eventType).add(callback);\n   187\u2192    return () => this.off(eventType, callback);\n   188\u2192  }\n   189\u2192\n   190\u2192  off(eventType, callback) {\n   191\u2192    this.listeners.get(eventType)?.delete(callback);\n   192\u2192  }\n   193\u2192\n   194\u2192  _emit(eventType, data) {\n   195\u2192    const callbacks = this.listeners.get(eventType);\n   196\u2192    if (callbacks) {\n   197\u2192      for (const cb of callbacks) {\n   198\u2192        cb(data);\n   199\u2192      }\n   200\u2192    }\n   201\u2192    // Also emit wildcard\n   202\u2192    const wildcards = this.listeners.get('*');\n   203\u2192    if (wildcards) {\n   204\u2192      for (const cb of wildcards) {\n   205\u2192        cb({ type: eventType, ...data });\n   206\u2192      }\n   207\u2192    }\n   208\u2192  }\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Character AI / Wander behavior \u2500\u2500\n   211\u2192\n   212\u2192  _wanderTick() {\n   213\u2192    // Advance simulated clock each tick\n   214\u2192    this.simClock.advance();\n   215\u2192\n   216\u2192    for (const char of this.characters) {\n   217\u2192      if (char.action !== 'idle') continue;\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192      // AI mode: delegate to AI decision engine\n   220\u2192      if (this.aiMode && this.aiEngine) {\n   221\u2192        if (!this.aiEngine.isPending(char.id)) {\n   222\u2192          this.aiEngine.tick(char, this.tickIntervalMs);\n   223\u2192        }\n   224\u2192        continue;\n   225\u2192      }\n   226\u2192\n   227\u2192      // Random wander with cooldown\n   228\u2192      char.wanderCooldown -= this.tickIntervalMs;\n   229\u2192      if (char.wanderCooldown > 0) continue;\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192      // Priority actions first (reactive behavior), then random wander\n   232\u2192      const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);\n   233\u2192      const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);\n   234\u2192      const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';\n   235\u2192\n   236\u2192      if (!target) {\n   237\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;\n   238\u2192        continue;\n   239\u2192      }\n   240\u2192\n   241\u2192      const tile = findInteractTile(target.position);\n   242\u2192      if (!tile) {\n   243\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;\n   244\u2192        continue;\n   245\u2192      }\n   246\u2192\n   247\u2192      // Already adjacent \u2014 interact directly\n   248\u2192      const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);\n   249\u2192      if (atTarget) {\n   250\u2192        this._doInteraction(char, target, action);\n   251\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;\n   252\u2192      } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {\n   253\u2192        char.targetObjectId = target.id;\n   254\u2192        char.pendingAction = action;\n   255\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;\n   256\u2192      } else {\n   257\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;\n   258\u2192      }\n   259\u2192    }\n   260\u2192  }\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192  /** Immediate random wander (no cooldown) \u2014 used as AI fallback. */\n   263\u2192  _randomWander(char) {\n   264\u2192    const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);\n   265\u2192    const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);\n   266\u2192    const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';\n   267\u2192\n   268\u2192    if (!target) return;\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192    const tile = findInteractTile(target.position);\n   271\u2192    if (!tile) return;\n   272\u2192\n   273\u2192    const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);\n   274\u2192    if (atTarget) {\n   275\u2192      this._doInteraction(char, target, action);\n   276\u2192    } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {\n   277\u2192      char.targetObjectId = target.id;\n   278\u2192      char.pendingAction = action;\n   279\u2192    }\n   280\u2192  }\n   281\u2192\n   282\u2192  _updateCharacters(deltaMs) {\n   283\u2192    for (const char of this.characters) {\n   284\u2192      const wasWalking = char.action === 'walking';\n   285\u2192      char.update(deltaMs);\n   286\u2192\n   287\u2192      // Character just arrived at destination\n   288\u2192      if (wasWalking && char.action === 'idle') {\n   289\u2192        if (char.targetObjectId) {\n   290\u2192          const obj = this.objectEngine.get(char.targetObjectId);\n   291\u2192          if (obj) {\n   292\u2192            this._doInteraction(char, obj, char.pendingAction || 'use');\n   293\u2192          } else {\n   294\u2192            char.targetObjectId = null;\n   295\u2192          }\n   296\u2192          char.pendingAction = 'use';\n   297\u2192        } else if (char.targetCharId) {\n   298\u2192          // Character arrived near another character for conversation \u2014 face each other\n   299\u2192          const target = this.characters.find(c => c.id === char.targetCharId);\n   300\u2192          if (target) {\n   301\u2192            char._updateFacing(target.tx - char.tx, target.ty - char.ty);\n   302\u2192            target._updateFacing(char.tx - target.tx, char.ty - target.ty);\n   303\u2192          }\n   304\u2192          char.targetCharId = null;\n   305\u2192        }\n   306\u2192      }\n   307\u2192    }\n   308\u2192  }\n   309\u2192\n   310\u2192  _doInteraction(char, obj, action = 'use') {\n   311\u2192    // Face toward the object\n   312\u2192    const objCx = obj.position.tx + (obj.position.tw || 1) / 2;\n   313\u2192    const objCy = obj.position.ty + (obj.position.th || 1) / 2;\n   314\u2192    const dx = objCx - char.tx;\n   315\u2192    const dy = objCy - char.ty;\n   316\u2192    if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {\n   317\u2192      char._updateFacing(dx, 0);\n   318\u2192    } else {\n   319\u2192      char._updateFacing(0, dy);\n   320\u2192    }\n   321\u2192\n   322\u2192    const event = this.objectEngine.interact(obj.id, action);\n   323\u2192    if (event) {\n   324\u2192      char.startInteraction(obj.id);\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192      // Successful interaction \u2192 happy (unless already upset)\n   327\u2192      if (char.mood !== 'upset') {\n   328\u2192        char.setMood('happy', 5000);\n   329\u2192      }\n   330\u2192\n   331\u2192      this._emit('character:interact', {\n   332\u2192        characterId: char.id, characterName: char.name,\n   333\u2192        objectId: obj.id, objectName: event.objectName,\n   334\u2192        from: event.from, to: event.to,\n   335\u2192        produces: event.produces || null,\n   336\u2192        emoji: event.emoji || null,\n   337\u2192      });\n   338\u2192    } else {\n   339\u2192      char.targetObjectId = null;\n   340\u2192    }\n   341\u2192  }\n   342\u2192\n   343\u2192  _getPriorityTarget(char) {\n   344\u2192    // Sol: pick up book if closed and nearby\n   345\u2192    if (char.id === 'sol') {\n   346\u2192      const book = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_book');\n   347\u2192      if (book && book.state === 'closed') {\n   348\u2192        const dist = Math.abs(book.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(book.position.ty - char.ty);\n   349\u2192        if (dist <= 6) {\n   350\u2192          return { obj: book, action: 'use' };\n   351\u2192        }\n   352\u2192      }\n   353\u2192    }\n   354\u2192\n   355\u2192    // Non-Maple near stocked display \u2192 take pastry\n   356\u2192    if (char.id !== 'maple') {\n   357\u2192      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   358\u2192      if (display && display.state === 'stocked') {\n   359\u2192        const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);\n   360\u2192        if (dist <= 8) {\n   361\u2192          return { obj: display, action: 'use' };\n   362\u2192        }\n   363\u2192      }\n   364\u2192    }\n   365\u2192\n   366\u2192    // Maple: restock empty display case\n   367\u2192    if (char.id === 'maple') {\n   368\u2192      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   369\u2192      if (display && display.state === 'empty') {\n   370\u2192        return { obj: display, action: 'use' };\n   371\u2192      }\n   372\u2192    }\n   373\u2192\n   374\u2192    return null;\n   375\u2192  }\n   376\u2192\n   377\u2192  _pickWanderTarget(char) {\n   378\u2192    const allObjects = this.objectEngine.getAll();\n   379\u2192\n   380\u2192    // 60% home sector, 40% any sector\n   381\u2192    let candidates;\n   382\u2192    if (Math.random() < 0.6) {\n   383\u2192      candidates = allObjects.filter(o => o.sector === char.homeSector);\n   384\u2192      if (candidates.length === 0) candidates = allObjects;\n   385\u2192    } else {\n   386\u2192      candidates = allObjects;\n   387\u2192    }\n   388\u2192\n   389\u2192    // Avoid repeating last interaction\n   390\u2192    if (char.lastObjectId && candidates.length > 1) {\n   391\u2192      candidates = candidates.filter(o => o.id !== char.lastObjectId);\n   392\u2192    }\n   393\u2192\n   394\u2192    if (candidates.length === 0) return null;\n   395\u2192    return candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];\n   396\u2192  }\n   397\u2192\n   398\u2192  _reactToObjectEvent(event) {\n   399\u2192    // Espresso done \u2192 Maple happy\n   400\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_espresso' && event.to === 'done') {\n   401\u2192      const maple = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'maple');\n   402\u2192      if (maple) maple.setMood('happy', 10000);\n   403\u2192    }\n   404\u2192\n   405\u2192    // Easel finished \u2192 Nyx happy\n   406\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'apt_easel' && event.to === 'finished') {\n   407\u2192      const nyx = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'nyx');\n   408\u2192      if (nyx) nyx.setMood('happy', 20000);\n   409\u2192    }\n   410\u2192\n   411\u2192    // Display restocked \u2192 nearby characters happy\n   412\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_display' && event.to === 'stocked') {\n   413\u2192      for (const char of this.characters) {\n   414\u2192        const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   415\u2192        if (display) {\n   416\u2192          const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);\n   417\u2192          if (dist <= 6) char.setMood('happy', 10000);\n   418\u2192        }\n   419\u2192      }\n   420\u2192    }\n   421\u2192  }\n   422\u2192\n   423\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Internal loop \u2500\u2500\n   424\u2192\n   425\u2192  _loop() {\n   426\u2192    if (!this.running) return;\n   427\u2192\n   428\u2192    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame((timestamp) => {\n   429\u2192      if (!this.running) return;\n   430\u2192\n   431\u2192      if (!this.paused) {\n   432\u2192        const rawDelta = timestamp - this._lastTimestamp;\n   433\u2192        const delta = Math.min(rawDelta, 500) * this.timeScale; // cap delta, apply scale\n   434\u2192\n   435\u2192        this._accumulator += delta;\n   436\u2192\n   437\u2192        // Process full ticks\n   438\u2192        while (this._accumulator >= this.tickIntervalMs) {\n   439\u2192          this._accumulator -= this.tickIntervalMs;\n   440\u2192          const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   441\u2192          this.tickCount++;\n   442\u2192          this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;\n   443\u2192\n   444\u2192          this._wanderTick();\n   445\u2192\n   446\u2192          this._emit('engine:tick', {\n   447\u2192            tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   448\u2192            elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   449\u2192            events: tickEvents,\n   450\u2192          });\n   451\u2192        }\n   452\u2192\n   453\u2192        // Smooth character movement each frame\n   454\u2192        this._updateCharacters(delta);\n   455\u2192      }\n   456\u2192\n   457\u2192      this._lastTimestamp = timestamp;\n   458\u2192      this._loop();\n   459\u2192    });\n   460\u2192  }\n   461\u2192}\n   462\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}

     1→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→// AI Decision Engine — LLM-driven character decisions
     3→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→//
     5→// Sits on top of the existing wander system. When enabled,
     6→// characters make decisions via the AI API instead of wandering
     7→// randomly. Falls back to random wander on failure/timeout.
     8→
     9→import { AIClient } from './api.js';
    10→import { findInteractTile } from './characters.js';
    11→import { SECTORS } from './world.js';
    12→
    13→const STAGGER_MS = 12000;
    14→const COOLDOWN_MIN = 30000;
    15→const COOLDOWN_MAX = 60000;
    16→
    17→export class AIDecisionEngine {
    18→  constructor(options = {}) {
    19→    this.client = new AIClient({
    20→      endpoint: options.endpoint || '',
    21→      timeoutMs: options.timeoutMs || 15000,
    22→    });
    23→    this.engine = null;
    24→    this.charState = new Map();
    25→    this.pendingMessages = new Map(); // charId → [{ from, dialogue }]
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  /** Link to the simulation engine (called once during setup). */
    29→  attach(engine) {
    30→    this.engine = engine;
    31→    this.charState.clear();
    32→    this.pendingMessages.clear();
    33→    engine.characters.forEach((char, i) => {
    34→      this.charState.set(char.id, {
    35→        cooldownMs: 5000 + i * STAGGER_MS,
    36→        pending: false,
    37→      });
    38→    });
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  setEndpoint(url) {
    42→    this.client.endpoint = url;
    43→  }
    44→
    45→  get endpoint() {
    46→    return this.client.endpoint;
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  /** Returns true if this character has a pending AI decision. */
    50→  isPending(charId) {
    51→    return this.charState.get(charId)?.pending || false;
    52→  }
    53→
    54→  /** Called each engine tick for each idle character. */
    55→  tick(char, deltaMs) {
    56→    const state = this.charState.get(char.id);
    57→    if (!state || state.pending) return;
    58→
    59→    state.cooldownMs -= deltaMs;
    60→    if (state.cooldownMs > 0) return;
    61→
    62→    state.cooldownMs = COOLDOWN_MIN + Math.random() * (COOLDOWN_MAX - COOLDOWN_MIN);
    63→    state.pending = true;
    64→
    65→    this._requestDecision(char).catch(() => {});
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  async _requestDecision(char) {
    69→    const state = this.charState.get(char.id);
    70→    const engineRef = this.engine;
    71→
    72→    try {
    73→      if (!this.client.endpoint) {
    74→        throw new Error('No API endpoint configured');
    75→      }
    76→
    77→      const objects = engineRef.objectEngine.getAll();
    78→      const characters = engineRef.characters;
    79→      const perception = char.getPerception(objects, characters);
    80→
    81→      // Attach pending messages from other characters
    82→      const messages = this.pendingMessages.get(char.id);
    83→      if (messages && messages.length > 0) {
    84→        perception.recentMessages = messages.slice();
    85→        this.pendingMessages.delete(char.id);
    86→      }
    87→
    88→      const decision = await this.client.decide({
    89→        character: char.name,
    90→        personality: char.personality,
    91→        perception,
    92→        mood: char.mood,
    93→        energy: char.energy,
    94→        time: engineRef.simClock.timeString,
    95→        day: engineRef.simClock.day,
    96→      });
    97→
    98→      // Engine might have been reset while we waited
    99→      if (this.engine !== engineRef) return;
   100→      if (char.action !== 'idle') return;
   101→
   102→      this._executeDecision(char, decision);
   103→    } catch (err) {
   104→      if (this.engine !== engineRef) return;
   105→      console.warn(`AI decision failed for ${char.name}:`, err.message || err);
   106→      if (char.action === 'idle') {
   107→        engineRef._randomWander(char);
   108→      }
   109→    } finally {
   110→      state.pending = false;
   111→    }
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  _executeDecision(char, decision) {
   115→    if (!decision || !decision.action) return;
   116→
   117→    const engine = this.engine;
   118→    const objects = engine.objectEngine.getAll();
   119→    const characters = engine.characters;
   120→
   121→    // Emit description for status bar
   122→    if (decision.description) {
   123→      engine._emit('ai:status', {
   124→        characterName: char.name,
   125→        description: decision.description,
   126→      });
   127→    }
   128→
   129→    switch (decision.action) {
   130→      case 'interact': {
   131→        const obj = this._resolveObject(decision.target, objects);
   132→        if (!obj) {
   133→          engine._randomWander(char);
   134→          return;
   135→        }
   136→
   137→        const tile = findInteractTile(obj.position);
   138→        if (!tile) {
   139→          engine._randomWander(char);
   140→          return;
   141→        }
   142→
   143→        const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);
   144→        if (atTarget) {
   145→          engine._doInteraction(char, obj, 'use');
   146→        } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {
   147→          char.targetObjectId = obj.id;
   148→          char.pendingAction = 'use';
   149→        }
   150→
   151→        if (decision.dialogue) {
   152→          engine._emit('ai:speech', { characterId: char.id, dialogue: decision.dialogue });
   153→        }
   154→        break;
   155→      }
   156→
   157→      case 'move': {
   158→        const sector = this._resolveSector(decision.target);
   159→        if (sector) {
   160→          const ox = Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) - 1;
   161→          const oy = Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) - 1;
   162→          char.moveTo(sector.tx + ox, sector.ty + oy);
   163→        }
   164→
   165→        if (decision.dialogue) {
   166→          engine._emit('ai:speech', { characterId: char.id, dialogue: decision.dialogue });
   167→        }
   168→        break;
   169→      }
   170→
   171→      case 'talk': {
   172→        const target = characters.find(c =>
   173→          c.id !== char.id && (
   174→            c.name.toLowerCase() === (decision.target || '').toLowerCase() ||
   175→            c.id === (decision.target || '').toLowerCase()
   176→          )
   177→        );
   178→
   179→        if (decision.dialogue) {
   180→          engine._emit('ai:speech', { characterId: char.id, dialogue: decision.dialogue });
   181→        }
   182→
   183→        if (target) {
   184→          // Queue message for target's next decision
   185→          if (!this.pendingMessages.has(target.id)) {
   186→            this.pendingMessages.set(target.id, []);
   187→          }
   188→          this.pendingMessages.get(target.id).push({
   189→            from: char.name,
   190→            dialogue: decision.dialogue || '',
   191→          });
   192→
   193→          // Move toward the target if far away, or face each other if already close
   194→          const dist = Math.abs(char.tx - target.tx) + Math.abs(char.ty - target.ty);
   195→          if (dist > 2) {
   196→            const adjTile = findInteractTile({
   197→              tx: Math.round(target.tx), ty: Math.round(target.ty), tw: 1, th: 1,
   198→            });
   199→            if (adjTile) {
   200→              char.moveTo(adjTile.tx, adjTile.ty);
   201→              char.targetCharId = target.id;
   202→            }
   203→          } else {
   204→            // Already nearby — face each other immediately
   205→            char._updateFacing(target.tx - char.tx, target.ty - char.ty);
   206→            target._updateFacing(char.tx - target.tx, char.ty - target.ty);
   207→          }
   208→
   209→          // Bump target's cooldown so they respond sooner
   210→          const targetState = this.charState.get(target.id);
   211→          if (targetState && !targetState.pending) {
   212→            targetState.cooldownMs = Math.min(targetState.cooldownMs, 8000 + Math.random() * 4000);
   213→          }
   214→        }
   215→        break;
   216→      }
   217→
   218→      case 'idle': {
   219→        // Character stays put — just show dialogue
   220→        if (decision.dialogue) {
   221→          engine._emit('ai:speech', { characterId: char.id, dialogue: decision.dialogue });
   222→        }
   223→        break;
   224→      }
   225→
   226→      default:
   227→        engine._randomWander(char);
   228→    }
   229→  }
   230→
   231→  _resolveObject(target, objects) {
   232→    if (!target) return null;
   233→    const lower = target.toLowerCase();
   234→    const underscored = lower.replace(/\s+/g, '_');
   235→    return objects.find(o => o.id === target) ||
   236→      objects.find(o => o.id === underscored) ||
   237→      objects.find(o => o.name.toLowerCase() === lower) ||
   238→      objects.find(o => o.id.endsWith(underscored)) ||
   239→      objects.find(o => o.name.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) ||
   240→      null;
   241→  }
   242→
   243→  _resolveSector(target) {
   244→    if (!target) return null;
   245→    const lower = target.toLowerCase();
   246→    if (SECTORS[lower]) return SECTORS[lower];
   247→    return Object.values(SECTORS).find(s =>
   248→      s.name.toLowerCase() === lower
   249→    ) || null;
   250→  }
   251→}
   252→

{
  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_014TVquFsgbmLBSf29S7pcyb",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "     1\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     2\u2192// AI Decision Engine \u2014 LLM-driven character decisions\n     3\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     4\u2192//\n     5\u2192// Sits on top of the existing wander system. When enabled,\n     6\u2192// characters make decisions via the AI API instead of wandering\n     7\u2192// randomly. Falls back to random wander on failure/timeout.\n     8\u2192\n     9\u2192import { AIClient } from './api.js';\n    10\u2192import { findInteractTile } from './characters.js';\n    11\u2192import { SECTORS } from './world.js';\n    12\u2192\n    13\u2192const STAGGER_MS = 12000;\n    14\u2192const COOLDOWN_MIN = 30000;\n    15\u2192const COOLDOWN_MAX = 60000;\n    16\u2192\n    17\u2192export class AIDecisionEngine {\n    18\u2192  constructor(options = {}) {\n    19\u2192    this.client = new AIClient({\n    20\u2192      endpoint: options.endpoint || '',\n    21\u2192      timeoutMs: options.timeoutMs || 15000,\n    22\u2192    });\n    23\u2192    this.engine = null;\n    24\u2192    this.charState = new Map();\n    25\u2192    this.pendingMessages = new Map(); // charId \u2192 [{ from, dialogue }]\n    26\u2192  }\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192  /** Link to the simulation engine (called once during setup). */\n    29\u2192  attach(engine) {\n    30\u2192    this.engine = engine;\n    31\u2192    this.charState.clear();\n    32\u2192    this.pendingMessages.clear();\n    33\u2192    engine.characters.forEach((char, i) => {\n    34\u2192      this.charState.set(char.id, {\n    35\u2192        cooldownMs: 5000 + i * STAGGER_MS,\n    36\u2192        pending: false,\n    37\u2192      });\n    38\u2192    });\n    39\u2192  }\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192  setEndpoint(url) {\n    42\u2192    this.client.endpoint = url;\n    43\u2192  }\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192  get endpoint() {\n    46\u2192    return this.client.endpoint;\n    47\u2192  }\n    48\u2192\n    49\u2192  /** Returns true if this character has a pending AI decision. */\n    50\u2192  isPending(charId) {\n    51\u2192    return this.charState.get(charId)?.pending || false;\n    52\u2192  }\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192  /** Called each engine tick for each idle character. */\n    55\u2192  tick(char, deltaMs) {\n    56\u2192    const state = this.charState.get(char.id);\n    57\u2192    if (!state || state.pending) return;\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192    state.cooldownMs -= deltaMs;\n    60\u2192    if (state.cooldownMs > 0) return;\n    61\u2192\n    62\u2192    state.cooldownMs = COOLDOWN_MIN + Math.random() * (COOLDOWN_MAX - COOLDOWN_MIN);\n    63\u2192    state.pending = true;\n    64\u2192\n    65\u2192    this._requestDecision(char).catch(() => {});\n    66\u2192  }\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192  async _requestDecision(char) {\n    69\u2192    const state = this.charState.get(char.id);\n    70\u2192    const engineRef = this.engine;\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192    try {\n    73\u2192      if (!this.client.endpoint) {\n    74\u2192        throw new Error('No API endpoint configured');\n    75\u2192      }\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192      const objects = engineRef.objectEngine.getAll();\n    78\u2192      const characters = engineRef.characters;\n    79\u2192      const perception = char.getPerception(objects, characters);\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192      // Attach pending messages from other characters\n    82\u2192      const messages = this.pendingMessages.get(char.id);\n    83\u2192      if (messages && messages.length > 0) {\n    84\u2192        perception.recentMessages = messages.slice();\n    85\u2192        this.pendingMessages.delete(char.id);\n    86\u2192      }\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192      const decision = await this.client.decide({\n    89\u2192        character: char.name,\n    90\u2192        personality: char.personality,\n    91\u2192        perception,\n    92\u2192        mood: char.mood,\n    93\u2192        energy: char.energy,\n    94\u2192        time: engineRef.simClock.timeString,\n    95\u2192        day: engineRef.simClock.day,\n    96\u2192      });\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192      // Engine might have been reset while we waited\n    99\u2192      if (this.engine !== engineRef) return;\n   100\u2192      if (char.action !== 'idle') return;\n   101\u2192\n   102\u2192      this._executeDecision(char, decision);\n   103\u2192    } catch (err) {\n   104\u2192      if (this.engine !== engineRef) return;\n   105\u2192      console.warn(`AI decision failed for ${char.name}:`, err.message || err);\n   106\u2192      if (char.action === 'idle') {\n   107\u2192        engineRef._randomWander(char);\n   108\u2192      }\n   109\u2192    } finally {\n   110\u2192      state.pending = false;\n   111\u2192    }\n   112\u2192  }\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192  _executeDecision(char, decision) {\n   115\u2192    if (!decision || !decision.action) return;\n   116\u2192\n   117\u2192    const engine = this.engine;\n   118\u2192    const objects = engine.objectEngine.getAll();\n   119\u2192    const characters = engine.characters;\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192    // Emit description for status bar\n   122\u2192    if (decision.description) {\n   123\u2192      engine._emit('ai:status', {\n   124\u2192        characterName: char.name,\n   125\u2192        description: decision.description,\n   126\u2192      });\n   127\u2192    }\n   128\u2192\n   129\u2192    switch (decision.action) {\n   130\u2192      case 'interact': {\n   131\u2192        const obj = this._resolveObject(decision.target, objects);\n   132\u2192        if (!obj) {\n   133\u2192          engine._randomWander(char);\n   134\u2192          return;\n   135\u2192        }\n   136\u2192\n   137\u2192        const tile = findInteractTile(obj.position);\n   138\u2192        if (!tile) {\n   139\u2192          engine._randomWander(char);\n   140\u2192          return;\n   141\u2192        }\n   142\u2192\n   143\u2192        const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);\n   144\u2192        if (atTarget) {\n   145\u2192          engine._doInteraction(char, obj, 'use');\n   146\u2192        } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {\n   147\u2192          char.targetObjectId = obj.id;\n   148\u2192          char.pendingAction = 'use';\n   149\u2192        }\n   150\u2192\n   151\u2192        if (decision.dialogue) {\n   152\u2192          engine._emit('ai:speech', { characterId: char.id, dialogue: decision.dialogue });\n   153\u2192        }\n   154\u2192        break;\n   155\u2192      }\n   156\u2192\n   157\u2192      case 'move': {\n   158\u2192        const sector = this._resolveSector(decision.target);\n   159\u2192        if (sector) {\n   160\u2192          const ox = Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) - 1;\n   161\u2192          const oy = Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) - 1;\n   162\u2192          char.moveTo(sector.tx + ox, sector.ty + oy);\n   163\u2192        }\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192        if (decision.dialogue) {\n   166\u2192          engine._emit('ai:speech', { characterId: char.id, dialogue: decision.dialogue });\n   167\u2192        }\n   168\u2192        break;\n   169\u2192      }\n   170\u2192\n   171\u2192      case 'talk': {\n   172\u2192        const target = characters.find(c =>\n   173\u2192          c.id !== char.id && (\n   174\u2192            c.name.toLowerCase() === (decision.target || '').toLowerCase() ||\n   175\u2192            c.id === (decision.target || '').toLowerCase()\n   176\u2192          )\n   177\u2192        );\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192        if (decision.dialogue) {\n   180\u2192          engine._emit('ai:speech', { characterId: char.id, dialogue: decision.dialogue });\n   181\u2192        }\n   182\u2192\n   183\u2192        if (target) {\n   184\u2192          // Queue message for target's next decision\n   185\u2192          if (!this.pendingMessages.has(target.id)) {\n   186\u2192            this.pendingMessages.set(target.id, []);\n   187\u2192          }\n   188\u2192          this.pendingMessages.get(target.id).push({\n   189\u2192            from: char.name,\n   190\u2192            dialogue: decision.dialogue || '',\n   191\u2192          });\n   192\u2192\n   193\u2192          // Move toward the target if far away, or face each other if already close\n   194\u2192          const dist = Math.abs(char.tx - target.tx) + Math.abs(char.ty - target.ty);\n   195\u2192          if (dist > 2) {\n   196\u2192            const adjTile = findInteractTile({\n   197\u2192              tx: Math.round(target.tx), ty: Math.round(target.ty), tw: 1, th: 1,\n   198\u2192            });\n   199\u2192            if (adjTile) {\n   200\u2192              char.moveTo(adjTile.tx, adjTile.ty);\n   201\u2192              char.targetCharId = target.id;\n   202\u2192            }\n   203\u2192          } else {\n   204\u2192            // Already nearby \u2014 face each other immediately\n   205\u2192            char._updateFacing(target.tx - char.tx, target.ty - char.ty);\n   206\u2192            target._updateFacing(char.tx - target.tx, char.ty - target.ty);\n   207\u2192          }\n   208\u2192\n   209\u2192          // Bump target's cooldown so they respond sooner\n   210\u2192          const targetState = this.charState.get(target.id);\n   211\u2192          if (targetState && !targetState.pending) {\n   212\u2192            targetState.cooldownMs = Math.min(targetState.cooldownMs, 8000 + Math.random() * 4000);\n   213\u2192          }\n   214\u2192        }\n   215\u2192        break;\n   216\u2192      }\n   217\u2192\n   218\u2192      case 'idle': {\n   219\u2192        // Character stays put \u2014 just show dialogue\n   220\u2192        if (decision.dialogue) {\n   221\u2192          engine._emit('ai:speech', { characterId: char.id, dialogue: decision.dialogue });\n   222\u2192        }\n   223\u2192        break;\n   224\u2192      }\n   225\u2192\n   226\u2192      default:\n   227\u2192        engine._randomWander(char);\n   228\u2192    }\n   229\u2192  }\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192  _resolveObject(target, objects) {\n   232\u2192    if (!target) return null;\n   233\u2192    const lower = target.toLowerCase();\n   234\u2192    const underscored = lower.replace(/\\s+/g, '_');\n   235\u2192    return objects.find(o => o.id === target) ||\n   236\u2192      objects.find(o => o.id === underscored) ||\n   237\u2192      objects.find(o => o.name.toLowerCase() === lower) ||\n   238\u2192      objects.find(o => o.id.endsWith(underscored)) ||\n   239\u2192      objects.find(o => o.name.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) ||\n   240\u2192      null;\n   241\u2192  }\n   242\u2192\n   243\u2192  _resolveSector(target) {\n   244\u2192    if (!target) return null;\n   245\u2192    const lower = target.toLowerCase();\n   246\u2192    if (SECTORS[lower]) return SECTORS[lower];\n   247\u2192    return Object.values(SECTORS).find(s =>\n   248\u2192      s.name.toLowerCase() === lower\n   249\u2192    ) || null;\n   250\u2192  }\n   251\u2192}\n   252\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}

USERMESSAGE #64
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→// Object State Machine Engine
     3→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→//
     5→// Objects are defined as JSON with state machines. Each state can have:
     6→//   - visual: string descriptor for renderer
     7→//   - particles: optional particle effect name
     8→//   - emoji: optional emoji to float on enter
     9→//   - auto_next: { state, after (seconds) } — timed auto-transition
    10→//   - transitions: { action_name: { next, duration?, requires?, produces?, target? } }
    11→//
    12→// The engine ticks all objects, advancing auto_next timers.
    13→// Characters trigger transitions via interact(objectId, action).
    14→
    15→export class ObjectInstance {
    16→  constructor(def) {
    17→    this.id = def.id;
    18→    this.name = def.name;
    19→    this.sector = def.sector;
    20→    this.arena = def.arena;
    21→    this.position = { ...def.position };
    22→    this.states = def.states;
    23→    this.state = def.state || Object.keys(def.states)[0];
    24→    this.timer = 0; // ms elapsed in current state
    25→    this.autoNextDuration = this._getAutoNextDuration(); // ms until auto-transition (null if none)
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  _getAutoNextDuration() {
    29→    const stateDef = this.states[this.state];
    30→    if (stateDef?.auto_next) {
    31→      return stateDef.auto_next.after * 1000; // convert seconds → ms
    32→    }
    33→    return null;
    34→  }
    35→
    36→  get currentStateDef() {
    37→    return this.states[this.state];
    38→  }
    39→
    40→  get visual() {
    41→    return this.currentStateDef?.visual || this.state;
    42→  }
    43→
    44→  get particles() {
    45→    return this.currentStateDef?.particles || null;
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  get timeRemainingMs() {
    49→    if (this.autoNextDuration === null) return null;
    50→    return Math.max(0, this.autoNextDuration - this.timer);
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  // Returns a transition event if auto_next fires, or null
    54→  tick(deltaMs) {
    55→    if (this.autoNextDuration === null) return null;
    56→
    57→    this.timer += deltaMs;
    58→
    59→    if (this.timer >= this.autoNextDuration) {
    60→      const autoNext = this.currentStateDef.auto_next;
    61→      return this._transition(autoNext.state, 'auto');
    62→    }
    63→
    64→    return null;
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  // Attempt a character-triggered interaction.
    68→  // Returns a transition event, or null if no valid transition.
    69→  interact(action = 'use') {
    70→    const stateDef = this.currentStateDef;
    71→    if (!stateDef?.transitions) return null;
    72→
    73→    const transition = stateDef.transitions[action];
    74→    if (!transition) return null;
    75→
    76→    // If the transition requires a character, that's expected (caller is a character)
    77→    return this._transition(transition.next, action, transition);
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  _transition(nextState, trigger, transitionDef = null) {
    81→    const prevState = this.state;
    82→    const prevVisual = this.visual;
    83→
    84→    this.state = nextState;
    85→    this.timer = 0;
    86→    this.autoNextDuration = this._getAutoNextDuration();
    87→
    88→    return {
    89→      objectId: this.id,
    90→      objectName: this.name,
    91→      from: prevState,
    92→      to: nextState,
    93→      trigger,
    94→      visual: this.visual,
    95→      particles: this.particles,
    96→      emoji: this.currentStateDef?.emoji || null,
    97→      produces: transitionDef?.produces || null,
    98→      target: transitionDef?.target || null,
    99→      timestamp: Date.now(),
   100→    };
   101→  }
   102→
   103→  // Force-set state (e.g., when another object's transition produces something here)
   104→  setState(newState) {
   105→    if (!this.states[newState]) return null;
   106→    return this._transition(newState, 'external');
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  toJSON() {
   110→    return {
   111→      id: this.id,
   112→      name: this.name,
   113→      state: this.state,
   114→      visual: this.visual,
   115→      particles: this.particles,
   116→      timer: this.timer,
   117→      timeRemainingMs: this.timeRemainingMs,
   118→      sector: this.sector,
   119→      arena: this.arena,
   120→      position: this.position,
   121→    };
   122→  }
   123→}
   124→
   125→export class ObjectEngine {
   126→  constructor() {
   127→    this.objects = new Map();    // id → ObjectInstance
   128→    this.listeners = [];         // event subscribers
   129→  }
   130→
   131→  addObject(def) {
   132→    const obj = new ObjectInstance(def);
   133→    this.objects.set(obj.id, obj);
   134→    return obj;
   135→  }
   136→
   137→  addObjects(defs) {
   138→    for (const def of defs) {
   139→      this.addObject(def);
   140→    }
   141→  }
   142→
   143→  get(objectId) {
   144→    return this.objects.get(objectId);
   145→  }
   146→
   147→  getAll() {
   148→    return [...this.objects.values()];
   149→  }
   150→
   151→  getBySector(sector) {
   152→    return this.getAll().filter(o => o.sector === sector);
   153→  }
   154→
   155→  // Advance all object timers by deltaMs.
   156→  // Returns array of transition events that fired.
   157→  tick(deltaMs) {
   158→    const events = [];
   159→
   160→    for (const obj of this.objects.values()) {
   161→      const event = obj.tick(deltaMs);
   162→      if (event) {
   163→        events.push(event);
   164→        this._handleProduction(event);
   165→      }
   166→    }
   167→
   168→    // Notify listeners
   169→    for (const event of events) {
   170→      this._emit(event);
   171→    }
   172→
   173→    return events;
   174→  }
   175→
   176→  // Character interacts with an object.
   177→  // Returns transition event or null.
   178→  interact(objectId, action = 'use') {
   179→    const obj = this.objects.get(objectId);
   180→    if (!obj) return null;
   181→
   182→    const event = obj.interact(action);
   183→    if (event) {
   184→      this._handleProduction(event);
   185→      this._emit(event);
   186→    }
   187→
   188→    return event;
   189→  }
   190→
   191→  // Handle "produces" side-effects (e.g., oven done → bread in display_case)
   192→  _handleProduction(event) {
   193→    if (event.produces && event.target) {
   194→      const targetObj = this.objects.get(event.target);
   195→      if (targetObj) {
   196→        // Map production to a state on the target object
   197→        const targetEvent = targetObj.setState(event.produces);
   198→        if (targetEvent) {
   199→          targetEvent.trigger = `produced_by:${event.objectId}`;
   200→          this._emit(targetEvent);
   201→        }
   202→      }
   203→    }
   204→  }
   205→
   206→  onTransition(callback) {
   207→    this.listeners.push(callback);
   208→    return () => {
   209→      this.listeners = this.listeners.filter(l => l !== callback);
   210→    };
   211→  }
   212→
   213→  _emit(event) {
   214→    for (const listener of this.listeners) {
   215→      listener(event);
   216→    }
   217→  }
   218→
   219→  // Snapshot of all objects for debugging/display
   220→  snapshot() {
   221→    const result = {};
   222→    for (const [id, obj] of this.objects) {
   223→      result[id] = obj.toJSON();
   224→    }
   225→    return result;
   226→  }
   227→}
   228→

  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_01GTQg6Fc8Kty18tGQkUyy1V",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "     1\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     2\u2192// Object State Machine Engine\n     3\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     4\u2192//\n     5\u2192// Objects are defined as JSON with state machines. Each state can have:\n     6\u2192//   - visual: string descriptor for renderer\n     7\u2192//   - particles: optional particle effect name\n     8\u2192//   - emoji: optional emoji to float on enter\n     9\u2192//   - auto_next: { state, after (seconds) } \u2014 timed auto-transition\n    10\u2192//   - transitions: { action_name: { next, duration?, requires?, produces?, target? } }\n    11\u2192//\n    12\u2192// The engine ticks all objects, advancing auto_next timers.\n    13\u2192// Characters trigger transitions via interact(objectId, action).\n    14\u2192\n    15\u2192export class ObjectInstance {\n    16\u2192  constructor(def) {\n    17\u2192    this.id = def.id;\n    18\u2192    this.name = def.name;\n    19\u2192    this.sector = def.sector;\n    20\u2192    this.arena = def.arena;\n    21\u2192    this.position = { ...def.position };\n    22\u2192    this.states = def.states;\n    23\u2192    this.state = def.state || Object.keys(def.states)[0];\n    24\u2192    this.timer = 0; // ms elapsed in current state\n    25\u2192    this.autoNextDuration = this._getAutoNextDuration(); // ms until auto-transition (null if none)\n    26\u2192  }\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192  _getAutoNextDuration() {\n    29\u2192    const stateDef = this.states[this.state];\n    30\u2192    if (stateDef?.auto_next) {\n    31\u2192      return stateDef.auto_next.after * 1000; // convert seconds \u2192 ms\n    32\u2192    }\n    33\u2192    return null;\n    34\u2192  }\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192  get currentStateDef() {\n    37\u2192    return this.states[this.state];\n    38\u2192  }\n    39\u2192\n    40\u2192  get visual() {\n    41\u2192    return this.currentStateDef?.visual || this.state;\n    42\u2192  }\n    43\u2192\n    44\u2192  get particles() {\n    45\u2192    return this.currentStateDef?.particles || null;\n    46\u2192  }\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192  get timeRemainingMs() {\n    49\u2192    if (this.autoNextDuration === null) return null;\n    50\u2192    return Math.max(0, this.autoNextDuration - this.timer);\n    51\u2192  }\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192  // Returns a transition event if auto_next fires, or null\n    54\u2192  tick(deltaMs) {\n    55\u2192    if (this.autoNextDuration === null) return null;\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192    this.timer += deltaMs;\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192    if (this.timer >= this.autoNextDuration) {\n    60\u2192      const autoNext = this.currentStateDef.auto_next;\n    61\u2192      return this._transition(autoNext.state, 'auto');\n    62\u2192    }\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192    return null;\n    65\u2192  }\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192  // Attempt a character-triggered interaction.\n    68\u2192  // Returns a transition event, or null if no valid transition.\n    69\u2192  interact(action = 'use') {\n    70\u2192    const stateDef = this.currentStateDef;\n    71\u2192    if (!stateDef?.transitions) return null;\n    72\u2192\n    73\u2192    const transition = stateDef.transitions[action];\n    74\u2192    if (!transition) return null;\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192    // If the transition requires a character, that's expected (caller is a character)\n    77\u2192    return this._transition(transition.next, action, transition);\n    78\u2192  }\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192  _transition(nextState, trigger, transitionDef = null) {\n    81\u2192    const prevState = this.state;\n    82\u2192    const prevVisual = this.visual;\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192    this.state = nextState;\n    85\u2192    this.timer = 0;\n    86\u2192    this.autoNextDuration = this._getAutoNextDuration();\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192    return {\n    89\u2192      objectId: this.id,\n    90\u2192      objectName: this.name,\n    91\u2192      from: prevState,\n    92\u2192      to: nextState,\n    93\u2192      trigger,\n    94\u2192      visual: this.visual,\n    95\u2192      particles: this.particles,\n    96\u2192      emoji: this.currentStateDef?.emoji || null,\n    97\u2192      produces: transitionDef?.produces || null,\n    98\u2192      target: transitionDef?.target || null,\n    99\u2192      timestamp: Date.now(),\n   100\u2192    };\n   101\u2192  }\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192  // Force-set state (e.g., when another object's transition produces something here)\n   104\u2192  setState(newState) {\n   105\u2192    if (!this.states[newState]) return null;\n   106\u2192    return this._transition(newState, 'external');\n   107\u2192  }\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192  toJSON() {\n   110\u2192    return {\n   111\u2192      id: this.id,\n   112\u2192      name: this.name,\n   113\u2192      state: this.state,\n   114\u2192      visual: this.visual,\n   115\u2192      particles: this.particles,\n   116\u2192      timer: this.timer,\n   117\u2192      timeRemainingMs: this.timeRemainingMs,\n   118\u2192      sector: this.sector,\n   119\u2192      arena: this.arena,\n   120\u2192      position: this.position,\n   121\u2192    };\n   122\u2192  }\n   123\u2192}\n   124\u2192\n   125\u2192export class ObjectEngine {\n   126\u2192  constructor() {\n   127\u2192    this.objects = new Map();    // id \u2192 ObjectInstance\n   128\u2192    this.listeners = [];         // event subscribers\n   129\u2192  }\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192  addObject(def) {\n   132\u2192    const obj = new ObjectInstance(def);\n   133\u2192    this.objects.set(obj.id, obj);\n   134\u2192    return obj;\n   135\u2192  }\n   136\u2192\n   137\u2192  addObjects(defs) {\n   138\u2192    for (const def of defs) {\n   139\u2192      this.addObject(def);\n   140\u2192    }\n   141\u2192  }\n   142\u2192\n   143\u2192  get(objectId) {\n   144\u2192    return this.objects.get(objectId);\n   145\u2192  }\n   146\u2192\n   147\u2192  getAll() {\n   148\u2192    return [...this.objects.values()];\n   149\u2192  }\n   150\u2192\n   151\u2192  getBySector(sector) {\n   152\u2192    return this.getAll().filter(o => o.sector === sector);\n   153\u2192  }\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192  // Advance all object timers by deltaMs.\n   156\u2192  // Returns array of transition events that fired.\n   157\u2192  tick(deltaMs) {\n   158\u2192    const events = [];\n   159\u2192\n   160\u2192    for (const obj of this.objects.values()) {\n   161\u2192      const event = obj.tick(deltaMs);\n   162\u2192      if (event) {\n   163\u2192        events.push(event);\n   164\u2192        this._handleProduction(event);\n   165\u2192      }\n   166\u2192    }\n   167\u2192\n   168\u2192    // Notify listeners\n   169\u2192    for (const event of events) {\n   170\u2192      this._emit(event);\n   171\u2192    }\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192    return events;\n   174\u2192  }\n   175\u2192\n   176\u2192  // Character interacts with an object.\n   177\u2192  // Returns transition event or null.\n   178\u2192  interact(objectId, action = 'use') {\n   179\u2192    const obj = this.objects.get(objectId);\n   180\u2192    if (!obj) return null;\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192    const event = obj.interact(action);\n   183\u2192    if (event) {\n   184\u2192      this._handleProduction(event);\n   185\u2192      this._emit(event);\n   186\u2192    }\n   187\u2192\n   188\u2192    return event;\n   189\u2192  }\n   190\u2192\n   191\u2192  // Handle \"produces\" side-effects (e.g., oven done \u2192 bread in display_case)\n   192\u2192  _handleProduction(event) {\n   193\u2192    if (event.produces && event.target) {\n   194\u2192      const targetObj = this.objects.get(event.target);\n   195\u2192      if (targetObj) {\n   196\u2192        // Map production to a state on the target object\n   197\u2192        const targetEvent = targetObj.setState(event.produces);\n   198\u2192        if (targetEvent) {\n   199\u2192          targetEvent.trigger = `produced_by:${event.objectId}`;\n   200\u2192          this._emit(targetEvent);\n   201\u2192        }\n   202\u2192      }\n   203\u2192    }\n   204\u2192  }\n   205\u2192\n   206\u2192  onTransition(callback) {\n   207\u2192    this.listeners.push(callback);\n   208\u2192    return () => {\n   209\u2192      this.listeners = this.listeners.filter(l => l !== callback);\n   210\u2192    };\n   211\u2192  }\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192  _emit(event) {\n   214\u2192    for (const listener of this.listeners) {\n   215\u2192      listener(event);\n   216\u2192    }\n   217\u2192  }\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192  // Snapshot of all objects for debugging/display\n   220\u2192  snapshot() {\n   221\u2192    const result = {};\n   222\u2192    for (const [id, obj] of this.objects) {\n   223\u2192      result[id] = obj.toJSON();\n   224\u2192    }\n   225\u2192    return result;\n   226\u2192  }\n   227\u2192}\n   228\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}
